channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pokwang's 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal' Stint Highlighted in Photo Collection
item.description: The article showcases a collection of photographs capturing memorable moments from Pokwang's participation in the popular game show 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal.' These images provide a visual recap of ...

item.title: Former US Senator Lindsey Graham passes away at 71
item.description: Lindsey Graham, a prominent US senator known for his close ties to former President Donald Trump, has passed away at the age of 71. The news comes amid ongoing political developments in the United Sta...

item.title: TSMC Reports Strong Q2 Earnings Amid Semiconductor Market Volatility
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC), the world's largest contract chipmaker, reported stronger-than-expected second-quarter earnings on July 13, 2026, despite ongoing challenges in the g...

item.title: U.S. and Iran clash over control of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States and Iran are engaged in a geopolitical standoff over control of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical waterway for global oil and gas trade. After a weekend of attacks across the Middle E...

item.title: Radical Right Parties Normalize Politics Influenced by Billionaires and Populist Authority
item.description: The article explores how global radical right parties are reshaping politics through billionaire-backed agendas, bypassing elite regulators and relying on populist rhetoric. It highlights the normaliz...

item.title: HEX20 Launches Six Satellites, Including MAYA-V1 and DINK-N1, in Next 12 Months
item.description: Thiruvananthapuram-based space-tech start-up HEX20, which successfully launched its second satellite KOYO on SpaceX’s Transporter-17 mission, has six more satellite missions planned for the next 12 mo...

item.title: Afreximbank highlights Dangote's role in African economic resilience
item.description: Afreximbank president George Elombi has stated that Nigerian businessman Aliko Dangote's extensive industrial investments are crucial for Africa's ability to withstand global economic disruptions. The...

item.title: Top 10 Bungalow House Plans for 2026
item.description: The article highlights 10 modern bungalow house designs ideal for 2026, emphasizing their unique features like open-concept layouts, terraces, and car parks. It advises homeowners to consult architect...

item.title: South Africa and France Strengthen Bilateral Ties Through Ramaphosa's Paris Visit
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's official visit to France focused on deepening bilateral cooperation between South Africa and France across trade, education, defence, and energy. During his trip, Ramaphosa...

item.title: INEC and ADC Dispute Nafiu Bala's Claim of Uploading Candidates
item.description: The article discusses the controversy surrounding Nafiu Bala's alleged attempt to upload the African Democratic Congress (ADC) candidates to the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) portal...

item.title: Sam Neill reflects on his career, personal life, cancer treatment and memorable film roles in his final interview
item.description: In what became his final interview, Sam Neill answered readers’ questions with humour, honesty and reflection, covering his long acting career, personal life and health. He spoke warmly about his life...

item.title: UK Designates Iran-Backed Group as Threat After Antisemitic Attacks
item.description: The United Kingdom has blamed an Iran-linked proxy group for a series of antisemitic arson attacks targeting Jewish sites across Europe, prompting the government to ban Tehran's Islamic Revolutionary ...

item.title: Renowned Actor Sam Neill Passes Away at 78
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed actor best known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in the 1993 blockbuster 'Jurassic Park,' has passed away at the age of 78. His family confirmed his death on July 13, 2026, sta...

item.title: Veteran actor Sam Neill dies aged 78, leaving legacy of iconic roles and family life
item.description: Veteran actor Sam Neill, best known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in the Jurassic Park franchise, has passed away at the age of 78. The New Zealand-born actor, who also appeared in films like Godzill...

item.title: SADC Ministers Address Regional Security Challenges in DRC, Mozambique, and Madagascar

item.title: Counter-terrorism police investigate alleged murder of Ann Widdecombe
item.description: British counter-terrorism police are leading the investigation into the alleged murder of former Conservative minister Ann Widdecombe, following new evidence suggesting a terrorist motive. Widdecombe,...

item.title: Supreme Court revises citizenship cases and suspends Tamil Nadu cow slaughter ban
item.description: The Supreme Court has overturned the Gauhati High Court's decision to declare 27 individuals as foreigners, remanding their cases to tribunals for fresh adjudication. The bench emphasized that determi...

item.title: JD Vance's Iran Policy Falters as Trump and Ukraine Stance Diverge
item.description: The article discusses Vice President JD Vance's struggling Iran policy and its implications amid political tensions. Allysia Finley, a Wall Street Editorial Board member, criticizes Vance's failed eff...

item.title: Safa Presidential Candidate Zungu Gains Regional Support Ahead of September Election
item.description: Sandile Zungu, Safa presidential candidate and AmaZulu chairman, has expressed confidence in his campaign's momentum ahead of the September 12 elections. Zungu acknowledges the need for continued effo...

item.title: Senator Escudero Proposes Adjusted Schedule for Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: Senator Francis 'Chiz' Escudero, who presides over the impeachment court, has proposed adjusting the schedule for the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. He suggested holding the trial i...
